name: kcov
description: Builds and installs kcov from source for shell script and binary code coverage.

kcovVersion.description: kcov version to install. Accepts with or without a leading 'v' (e.g. '43' or 'v43'). Use 'latest' to auto-detect the latest stable release.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container has kcov pre-installed globally for code coverage analysis. Use `kcov --include-path=<source-dir> <output-dir> <command>` to generate coverage reports for shell scripts, Python scripts, and compiled binaries. Reports are generated as HTML and Cobertura XML in the output directory for CI integration.
